text:
It's wired as a `Stop` hook (`~/.claude/settings.json:88-94`):

```json
"Stop": [{ "matcher": "", "hooks": [{
  "type": "command",
  "command": "/Users/pablofernandez/.bin/pc capture --in 300",
  "timeout": 10
}]}]
```

When the agent stops, this fires `pc capture --in 300`, which schedules the deferred background capture and returns immediately (well under the 10s hook timeout). The `300` is just a CLI fallback; the actual delay is read from config — and your config has it explicit at `~/.proactive-context/config.json:12`: [...] **Option 1 is implemented** — `--in` is now config-default with an optional override:

| Invocation | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `pc capture` | immediate (SessionEnd) |
| `pc capture --in` | debounce, delay = `capture_debounce_secs` (config) |
| `pc capture --in 90` | debounce, 90s override |
